name: 06_mc_absent_does_not_rearm_already_armed
description: When the position is already armed (armed=True) and MC is absent, the arming block must NOT call database.log_symphony_event a second time or set armed=True again (idempotent). The guard `and not bot_state[symphony_id]['armed']` must remain.

expected.derivation: already armed -> `and not currently_armed` guard in arming block fails. Should_arm may be True (fail-open) but the actual arm assignment and log_symphony_event call must be skipped. Armed state stays True (unchanged, not flipped). No duplicate arm log entry.
